facilities.name: North Dade Trash and Recycling Center
facilities.hours: Miami-Dade lists neighborhood trash and recycling centers as Wednesday through Sunday, 9:00 AM to 5:30 PM. Confirm before visiting.
facilities.fees: Many neighborhood center services are resident-focused and may be free for eligible Miami-Dade residents. Confirm current limits and ID rules before arrival.
facilities.rules: Use the official county page to confirm resident eligibility, load prep, and current item limits before driving.

facilities.name: West Dade Home Chemical Collection Center
facilities.hours: Check the official Miami-Dade home chemical collection page for current hours and holiday schedules before visiting.
facilities.fees: Household hazardous waste drop-off is generally resident-focused. Confirm current eligibility and item limits before arrival.
not_accepted: Materials outside the posted household program
facilities.rules: Use the county page to confirm accepted materials, packaging rules, and any proof-of-residency requirements before you drive.
